# freecodebeautify.app

> Free online code beautifier and formatter for JavaScript, HTML, CSS, JSON, XML, SQL, and more. Runs entirely in your browser — no data uploaded, no sign-up required.

## What it does
freecodebeautify.app is a free, browser-based code beautifier that formats messy or minified code into clean, readable output. All processing happens locally in your browser — no data is uploaded to any server.

## Key facts
- 100% free, no sign-up required
- Works offline (PWA)
- Privacy-first: zero tracking, no cookies, no analytics
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
- Part of the Freesuite collection (freesuite.app)

## Supported languages
- JavaScript (ES6+, JSX, TypeScript)
- HTML
- CSS (SCSS, LESS)
- JSON
- XML
- SQL

## Features
- Auto-detect language from code content
- Manual language selector override
- Customizable indentation (spaces or tabs, 2/4/8 size)
- Brace style options (collapse, expand, end-expand)
- Line wrap settings (none, 80, 120, 160)
- Drag-and-drop file upload
- Copy formatted output to clipboard
- Download beautified file
- Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Enter to beautify, Ctrl+Shift+C to copy)
- Dark mode support
- Settings saved to localStorage

## Comparisons
- vs Prettier: freecodebeautify.app is free, runs in-browser with zero config, and supports SQL/XML. Prettier requires npm setup and does not support SQL or XML.
- vs Beautifier.io: freecodebeautify.app has auto-detection, offline support, SQL/XML formatting, and no ads. Beautifier.io requires an internet connection and shows advertisements.

## Related tools
- freejsonformatter.app — JSON Formatter
- freebase64.app — Base64 Encoder/Decoder
- freediffchecker.app — Diff Checker
- freeregextester.app — Regex Tester
- freecaseconverter.app — Case Converter

- [Free HTML Formatter](https://freecodebeautify.app/pages/html-formatter): Beautify and indent HTML code
- [Free JSON Formatter & Beautifier](https://freecodebeautify.app/pages/json-formatter-beautifier): Pretty-print and validate JSON
